heading: Requirements of application for quitclaim deed
label: 641c Requirements of application for quitclaim deed
text: The application must include a list of all the lands which the State certifies should be transferred under the terms of , the basis for the certification of each tract included, and a quitclaim or relinquishment of all right, title, and interest in the State to any and all other lands under . Such quitclaim or relinquishment by the State shall not affect any private rights obtained from the State prior to .section 641a of this titlesection 641 of this titleAugust 13, 1954
